comments:
Miguel Diaz - 05/12/23 11:32:40 AM: Inspect the Laminate process/machinery from saw all the way to finish good for chips, dents, and scratches
*Check that no machine covers are sticking up that could be in the way of the passing parts on the  edge bander
*Check tape on edge bander return system transition .
*Check Pop up table stopper to have rubber in front of it 
*Check tape on end cover of the return system 
*Check for Glue spreader infeed table stile supports rounded edges 
*Check rubber on Yellow L brackets .
*Check Edge trimmer electrical board to be covered with Rubber 
*Check tape on return system transition 
*Check wheels stopper to have rubber in the front 
*Check pop up table stile staging area replace rubber if needed .
*Check 1540 door notcher to have rounded edges and rubber on table top 
*Check stile clamp to have rounded edges and not sharp also blow down table top ,wipe and spray with silicone spray 
*Check Gannomatt machine it should  not have  hardware sticking up past the table top blow down table top  and wipe and spray with silicone spray ..

audit_item: SCMH to perform Scheduled - PM Service -Planned Maintenance. ----
SCMH to perform Scheduled - PM Service -Planned Maintenance. ----
comments: Miguel Diaz - 04/27/22  7:59:49 AM: Tech was here a few weeks ago and performed the scheduled maintenance

audit_item: SCMH to perform Scheduled - PM Service -Planned Maintenance. ----
comments:
Miguel Diaz - 12/06/22  1:32:06 PM: Checked function of cylinders and valves also check if damaged or leaks 
*Checked hoses and hose joints for leaks or damage 
*Cleaned or replace filter inserts if needed 
*Checked Operating pressure 
*Checked Limit switch for proper function 
*Cleaned light barriers with rag no solvents
*Cleaned all sensors free of dust 
*Checked Vacuum and compressed air for supply and leaks 
*Checked seals for damage replace if necessary 
*Checked tooth belts for damage replace if worn 
*Check power cable chain for damage 
*Check guide rails Clean with cloth inspect for damage 
*Greased all ball rail guides lubricate with syringe until lubricant escapes .(Part#4-017-08-0073
*Greased central lubrication of guide carriage use grease gun 
*Remove and clean filters from control use compressed air 
*Check both L brackets in the middle to be leveled if they are bent upwards level back down 
*Checked all blue collar bushings spray them with Teflon spray make sure all support arms are in place and retaining clips are in place .
